text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day of the Kikuka Sho, which Kitasan Black's
greatest rival, Brusquement, will be absent from,
has arrived.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We arrive at the track early to get her psyched up
for the race, but...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, according to my Bakushin sources, the
racers who ran the St. Lite Kinen aren't forecasted
to do great in the Kikuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
BUT! This data's of no consequence! This race
distance will be no problem either!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
You're a Bakushin-musume with nerves of
tempered steel now, and it'll take more than that
to shake you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I agree with her. It's just a coincidence that
Kitasan Black doesn't have any good runs on
record, and 3,000 meters shouldn't be an issue.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The problem is—

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
(I really wanted to settle the score with her. I
wanted to end the Triple Crown on a high note
after defeating her. But...)

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
(Brusquement... I still can't believe you're not
running today...)

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
(It's okay, though! I don't need her to run my best!
No question about that!)

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
(But... Will I be satisfied when all is said and
done?)

Hello there! You look quite troubled. Something
on your mind?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
...!
Nature, what're you doing here?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I heard from Bakushin O that you'd probably be
over here. What's wrong? Do you wanna talk
about it?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Well, you see...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I see... I had a feeling that might be the case. It's
hard not to get hung up over the absence of your
rival, isn't it?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: It was that way for me, too.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: ...Huh? You had the same thing happen to you?!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Sure did. For me, it was your superstar Teio who
had gotten hurt.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I felt lost. The one I'd been dreaming of defeating
was gone.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: She didn't recover in time for the race either.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: What did you do then, Nature?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Well... I was quite discombobulated and kept
wondering how I was supposed to beat someone
who wasn't there...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
But it clicked at some point, and I realized it was
up to me in the end.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: What do you mean by that?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I mean, it all depended on how I ran that day
whether people would even notice Teio's
absence.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
So I decided I wasn't going to let anyone say
there was a big hole in the lineup.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
That was the answer I came up with back then. I'm
not sure if it'll help you much, though.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Whether people notice someone's missing from
the race or not is all dependent on how I run...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I see. I understand your point now. You're exactly
right, Nature!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Thank you so much! I think I've got my head on
straight now!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Good. Go give it your all. You can only compete
in the Kikuka Sho once in your life, so make sure
you finish it without any regrets, okay?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Goodness, you sure are in charge of an adorable
racer. I only gave her as much advice as I thought
would help her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I heard the whole thing. Kitasan Black's emotional
stability was my biggest concern, but it looks like
she'll be okay.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
This is a bit of a shock to me, though. I always
figured Kitasan was more like a radiant star,
different from how I was in the past.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
It's kind of comforting to know that even Kitasan
has weaknesses.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I look up at the sky without saying anything. It's
true that Kitasan Black has weaknesses...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But she's grown so much. And now, she'll have a
chance to show everyone just how far she's come
on the turf.
